repair_method: Use Auth Bypass Tool v2.1 before flashing preloader. Disable secure boot check in SP Flash Tool.
Extract PIT file from CSC package and flash with re-partition enabled in Odin.
Do not downgrade binary. Flash matching or higher firmware version. Use SamFw or Frija to get correct CSC.
Enter BROM mode via test point, use MTK Auth Bypass v3 with SP Flash Tool 5.1924.
Use Sahara protocol firehose loader matching the SBL1 version. Verify your programmer file matches the exact device variant.
Backup NVRAM first. Erase Frp and format storage before reflashing full scatter file.
Install Samsung USB Composite driver manually. Disable driver signature enforcement. Use Odin 3.14.4.
Replace firehose programmer with variant B. Ensure USB is connected pre-boot via EDL cable.
Short TP12 & TP13 pads simultaneously while inserting USB. Use CH341A programmer if BROM is still inaccessible.
Unlock bootloader first via 'fastboot flashing unlock'. Flash factory image with flash-all.bat script.
